name: Morristown Indoor Golf Club
about: Morristown Indoor Golf Club is a modern indoor facility focused on using technology to help golfers improve their game. The venue features multiple bays equipped with high-end TrackMan launch monitors, providing detailed data on every shot. They offer a range of services from individual and group lessons to self-practice sessions, with a membership model for unlimited access. The facility is designed with a clean, modern aesthetic and includes amenities like a dedicated putting green and training aids, positioning itself as a premium destination year-round practice and improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan launch monitors provide professional-grade data for every shot
Flexible 24/7 access for self-practice and improvement sessions
Comprehensive instructional programs with highly qualified PGA professionals and mental coaches

food_and_drink.notes: Located in Downtown Millburn with access to food and drinks nearby; no mention of an on-site kitchen.
No mention of an on-site bar or alcohol service; BYOB is not specified.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are required to bring your own clubs to use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on outside food and drinks. It does mention the facility is located near food and drink options in Downtown Millburn.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for a full 18-hole simulation.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information available regarding youth programs or the suitability of the facility for children.
